card_description: Brady (Nicholas) is a character in Philip K. Dick's *VALIS*. Character in the VALIS novel (distinct from Radio Free Albemuth's Nicholas Brady). Name note: Horselover Fat's friend. The friend who witnesses the visionary's transformation. First appears in *VALIS*. Context: "Dick identifies his experience as a literal fulfillment of Biblical promise (Psalm 116) and a commissioning into the class of "prophets."
